title: Playermodels Addon
description: This resourcepack adds a whole bunch of new models for the MorePlayerModels mod by Noppes
body:
![MPM_Banner](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/714242847074811985/1030503751779356773/playermodels_banner.png?width=1026&height=215)

**Playermodels Addon Pack**

This resourcepack adds a whole bunch of new models for the MorePlayerModels mod by Noppes.

***Important!** This pack is still in beta, so expect some issues or bugs!*


**Dependencies**

- [Forge Modlauncher (1.18.2+)](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/index_1.18.2.html)

- [MorePlayerModels (1.18.2+)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-player-models/files)

*This pack is NOT compatible with Minecraft versions prior to 1.18.2*


**Installation**

- Download the texturepack

- Drag it into your resource pack folder

    - Either via .minecraft -> resourcepacks

    - Or ingame via [ESC] -> Options -> Resourcepacks -> Open Folder...

- Activate the texture pack

- [Installation for Forge and MorePlayerModels](https://rpaddons.fandom.com/wiki/MPM_Addon)


**How to use your own textures**
<details>
    <summary>Expand</summary>
    I have added a sample texture for each model, which of course does not fit every skin. But there is a way to create your own texture:

I added the models as .bbmodel files in the texture pack, so you can edit them with Blockbench...


- Just open Blockbench from blockbench.net *(Web App)*

- Open the appropriate .bbmodel file

- Adjust the texture of the model you would like to have changed

- Save the texture and upload it to Discord

- Copy the image link

- Choose the right model ingame and click on the cogwheel

- Paste the link under "Skin URL"
</details>


 
**Errors and questions**

*(Discord is not yet fully translated)*



**Other projects**

*Please leave credit when you use this pack in Livestreams, Videos, or other projects.*

*You're not allowed to export the models from the pack or use them in another context than MPM without my explicit permission!*
